title: Kenvue Inc. - Investor Relations Overview
note: Company overview source for Kenvue's 2025 net sales, segment framing, global reach, people served, and core brand portfolio.

title: Our brands
note: Primary portfolio source for Kenvue's self care, skin health and beauty, and essential health categories, including Tylenol and Neutrogena.

title: Kimberly-Clark + Kenvue: Building a Global Health and Wellness Leader
note: Official transaction-information site documenting the proposed Kimberly-Clark and Kenvue combination and related investor disclosures.

title: Kenvue (KVUE) - Market capitalization
note: Point-in-time market capitalization source for Kenvue, including the June 2026 market-cap figure.

title: Kenvue (KVUE) - P/E ratio
note: Point-in-time trailing P/E ratio source for Kenvue.

title: Kenvue (KVUE) - Revenue
note: Revenue-history source used to benchmark Kenvue's scale and profitability context.

title: Kenvue (KVUE) - Earnings
note: EBIT-history source used for the profitability input metric.

title: Kenvue Shares Jump on First Day of Trading
note: IPO-date and IPO-era valuation source used only because both the first trading date and approximately $41 billion IPO valuation are documented together.

title: Headache and Pain Relief Products and Medicine
note: Primary product source for Tylenol categories, positioning, and pain relief and fever reduction use cases.

title: Skin Care Products for Healthier Skin
note: Primary product source for Neutrogena skincare, sunscreen, makeup, hair care, ingredient, and skin analysis positioning.

title: Acetaminophen
note: Regulatory and safety context for acetaminophen uses, dosing, label reading, overdose risks, and FDA monitoring.

title: DailyMed
note: Public drug-labeling database used as an enabler for label-level verification and generic medicine comparison.

title: openFDA
note: Open FDA data API source used as an enabler for adverse-event, label, and regulatory-data coordination concepts.

title: Modernization of Cosmetics Regulation Act of 2022
note: Cosmetics regulatory source for product listing, facility registration, safety substantiation, serious adverse event reporting, and recall authority.

title: Cosmetics Labeling Guide
note: Cosmetics labeling and ingredient-disclosure source used to ground skincare refill and batch-trust verification limits.

title: Materiom
note: Open biomaterials data and community source used as an enabling primitive for local materials and packaging experimentation.

title: A Big Bang for Plastic Recycling
note: Open plastic recycling and local workspace source used as an enabling primitive for reusable packaging and local materials loops.
